summary: Full-stack testing complete for Coffee Cafe 9. All 21 backend pytest cases pass against public URL covering health, auth (login/logout/me, cookie + Bearer), menu list/filter/CRUD/auth-guard, reviews list/filter/public submit/admin update+delete/auth-guard, homepage get/update/auth-guard, and contact public submit + admin list/auth-guard. Frontend Playwright e2e covers: home (bilingual hero EN/HI, popular/services/reviews-preview/location sections, embedded map iframe), menu page with 14 seeded items and category filter (Coffee=4), public review submission (visible after submit), about/contact navigation, contact form submit (success message), admin login invalid->error / valid->/admin, all 4 admin tabs switchable, menu CRUD via UI (create+delete TEST_PWItem), logout. No critical bugs found.

issues: React console warning: 'An empty string ("") was passed to the src attribute'. Likely a MenuCard / admin form image preview rendering when image URL is empty. Conditionally render or pass null.

After admin logout, user lands on /admin/login (because user=false triggers redirect). PRD wording was 'logout returns to /'. If desired, navigate('/') from AdminDashboard logout handler. Functional but minor UX deviation from spec.

action_items: Optional: Suppress 'empty string src' warning by conditionally rendering only when image url is non-empty in MenuCard / admin menu image preview.
Optional: Redirect to '/' instead of '/admin/login' after admin logout to match PRD text.
critical_code_review_comments: JWT_SECRET is read directly from env via os.environ['JWT_SECRET'] (good — fails fast).
MongoDB _id is consistently excluded via projection {"_id": 0} on all reads; create endpoints pop _id before returning (good).
Auth supports both httpOnly cookie and Authorization: Bearer fallback (good for cross-origin previews).

Cookie set with secure=False and samesite='lax' — acceptable for the preview deployment behind https proxy; if cookies fail in production, switch to samesite='none' + secure=True. Currently login also returns token in body so localStorage Bearer fallback works.
seed_data correctly upserts admin password if env password is rotated (covers the playbook seed_admin requirement).

No brute-force lockout / rate limiting on /api/auth/login — playbook hint suggested 5-fail lockout. Not implemented. Consider a slowapi/limiter or in-DB attempt counter for production hardening (non-blocker for MVP).

CORS_ORIGINS defaults to '*' but allow_credentials=True is set; with '*' browsers will reject credentials. Currently works because preview frontend is same external host as backend (proxy), but if cross-origin client is added, set explicit origins.
server.py is 403 lines — within the 700-line guideline; no refactor needed.
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds 13 menu items, 6 reviews, 1 homepage doc, and admin user on lifespan startup. Verified data present.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pytest fixtures rely on a session that retains cookies. Tests for unauth-guard endpoints intentionally use plain 'requests' (not the session fixture) to avoid cookie pollution. If you re-add session-based unauth tests, ensure session.cookies.clear() is called or use a new session.
rca of the issue: N/A — no production bugs. Initial 3 pytest failures were a test-isolation issue (shared session fixture carried admin cookies into 'unauth' tests). Fixed by switching unauth-check tests to fresh requests.* calls. After fix, 21/21 backend tests pass.
